tickets.title: /award command — banner image generation
tickets.description: Multi-step UI: name input → dropdowns (award, color, size) → PIL renders PNG. Uses send_message directly (not defer) to avoid 3-second Discord timeout. MD5-cached.
tickets.notes: Working in production. 19-award system with Discord custom emoji.

tickets.title: /tank command — live player card
tickets.description: Fetches live TankPit API profile, renders PIL player card PNG with name, faction, awards, stats, cups. TankSelectView dropdown for multiple results. Handles private profiles.
tickets.notes: Working. Known issue: cache keyed on tank_id only — see TANKPIT-007.

tickets.title: /leaderboard command — live leaderboard image
tickets.description: Fetches live TankPit leaderboard, renders PIL image. Options: year, top (1-100), color (red/purple/blue/orange), rank filter. Sends embed with clickable top-3 profile links.
tickets.notes: Working. Uses defer to handle latency.

tickets.title: /ask command — RAG + SQL hybrid Q&A
tickets.description: Two-layer pipeline: SQL layer handles structured queries (cups, kills, rank counts, award lists), RAG layer handles everything else via nomic-embed + Mistral. In-memory cache with TTL. Award emoji injection. Disabled on Railway (llama.cpp is local only).
tickets.notes: Working locally. Degrades gracefully on Railway. 5-min TTL for leaderboard queries, 1-hour for others.

tickets.title: 19-award system with Discord custom emoji
tickets.description: All 19 awards extracted from awards.gif sprite sheet. Custom emoji uploaded to Discord servers. AWARD_EMOJI and _EMOJI_BY_KEY dicts. inject_award_emoji() post-processes RAG answers. _awards_to_emoji() handles both clean and raw API award formats.
tickets.notes: Note: Discord's :purple_heart: conflicts — custom one uploaded as :purple_heart1:

tickets.title: Deploy to Railway (production)
tickets.description: Bot live on Railway US East Virginia. Two guilds: production (311890399767822359) and test (615551999701811221). railway.toml with nixpacks builder. Env vars: DISCORD_TOKEN, GUILD_ID, GUILD_ID_2.
tickets.notes: Running in production. /ask disabled on Railway — llama.cpp is local only.

tickets.title: Fix player card cache — stale cards on stat change
tickets.description: generate_player_card cache keyed on tank_id only. If a player's stats change, stale card is served until cache/ is manually cleared. Fix: key on hash of stats fields instead.
tickets.notes: Workaround: manually clear cache/ directory.

tickets.title: Clean up legacy files in bot directory
tickets.description: tankpit-bot-legacy/ has unused files: tankpit.db, tank_cache.pkl, seen_posts.json. Real DB is in tankpit-ai/. Safe to delete.

tickets.title: Prune unused dependencies
tickets.description: requirements.txt has beautifulsoup4 and lxml — both unused. Remove to keep install lean.

tickets.title: SQL: color/rank filter for cups and kills queries
tickets.description: Current SQL layer doesn't support cross-filters like 'who has the most gold cups among blue players' or 'top kills for colonels'. Add compound WHERE clauses for color + rank combination queries.

tickets.title: Fix occasional 404 Unknown Interaction on /leaderboard
tickets.description: Occasional Discord 404 Unknown Interaction errors on /leaderboard. /award was fixed by switching from defer to send_message. Investigate if /leaderboard needs the same treatment.
tickets.notes: /award fixed by using send_message directly. Monitor /leaderboard frequency.

tickets.title: Split bot.py into modules
tickets.description: bot.py is 1,467 lines — single file. Natural split: bot.py (setup + commands), banner.py (image generators), tankpit_api.py (API helpers), ask.py (RAG + SQL layer), utils/db.py.

tickets.title: Add Discord slash command: /help improvements
tickets.description: Current /help is a basic embed. Enhance with examples, subcommand details, and links to profile pages.

tickets.title: Leaderboard season reset / decay logic
tickets.description: Add weekly/monthly score decay or season resets so leaderboard stays competitive over time.

tickets.title: TankPit bible — 13,250 game profile chunks in SQLite
tickets.description: The 'bible' is TankPit's game knowledge base, NOT religious text. Built from crawling 13,250 TankPit player profiles + site pages (about, leaderboards, ~1,006 pages total). Chunks embedded with nomic-embed-text-v1.5 via llama.cpp. Stored in bible_chunks.json. Rebuilt 2026-03-17.
tickets.notes: 13,250 chunks. Location: /home/ukhan/tankpit-ai/bible_chunks.json. Rebuild cmd: cd ~/tankpit-ai && python rebuild_bible.py --scraped-dir scraped/profiles --output bible_chunks.json (takes 20-30 min, requires nomic-embed on 8081).

tickets.title: Hybrid RAG + SQL search working
tickets.description: Two-layer query pipeline: SQL handles structured game questions (cups, kills, rank counts), RAG handles natural language game questions via cosine similarity over 13,250 embedded chunks. Top-3 chunks fed as context to Mistral LLM.
tickets.notes: Working via /ask command locally. vector_search.py confirmed working standalone.

tickets.title: Merge leaderboards.json into bible chunks
tickets.description: leaderboards.json (scraped tournament/leaderboard data) is not yet part of the bible. RAG can't accurately answer 'who won 2024 tournaments' type questions. Merge into chunk pipeline in rebuild_bible.py.
tickets.notes: File exists at /home/ukhan/tankpit-ai/leaderboards.json

tickets.title: Schedule periodic bible rebuild (cron)
tickets.description: No cron job to re-scrape and rebuild bible. Player data goes stale. Set up WSL cron or systemd timer to run crawl_profiles.py + rebuild_bible.py periodically (weekly?).
tickets.notes: Rebuild takes 20-30 min. Need nomic-embed running. Could tie into SCRIPTS-003 (WSL startup script).

tickets.title: Scrape tankpit.db up to 13,250 players
tickets.description: SQLite DB at /home/ukhan/tankpit-ai/tankpit.db has 13,250 players with full schema: tank_id, name, rank, color, country, time_played, kills, deaths, cups, awards_json, bf_tank_name (alt-tank detection), leaderboard_rank_overall.
tickets.notes: leaderboard_snapshots table also populated for historical tracking.

tickets.title: Initial portfolio site build
tickets.description: Full portfolio with hero, skills, experience accordion, projects, certs, contact. Dark/light theme, Syne + IBM Plex fonts, scroll animations, CySA+ cert with Credly badge.
tickets.notes: Live at uk0430.github.io

tickets.title: Resume PDF download
tickets.description: Uzair_Khan_Resume.pdf hosted and linked from hero section.

tickets.title: GitHub Activity feed + terminal easter egg
tickets.description: Live GitHub events on main page via GitHub API. Backtick terminal with commands: whoami, ls, cat skills, ping, traceroute, cd ops, cd noc, cd tracker.

tickets.title: Contact form via Formspree + job tracker
tickets.description: Working contact form (Formspree). tracker.html — job application tracker with kanban columns, localStorage.

tickets.title: Ops dashboard + NOC tracker
tickets.description: ops.html: private ops dashboard. noc.html: this board reading noc-data.json. Both behind client-side login. Linked from footer [ops][noc][tracker] at 18% opacity.
tickets.notes: Private pages: ops.html, noc.html, tracker.html — noindex, auth-gated.

tickets.title: Client-side login for private pages
tickets.description: assets/auth.js: login overlay on ops.html, noc.html, tracker.html. Token stored in localStorage with 7-day expiry. Single login persists across all three pages.
tickets.notes: Credentials in JS source — security by obscurity only, fine for personal use on a static site.

tickets.title: GitHub Action — resume auto-update
tickets.description: Action that uses Claude API to regenerate resume text/PDF from latest work history and commits it to repo on a schedule or on trigger.

tickets.title: Blog / notes section
tickets.description: Simple static blog or TIL notes. Could be a JSON file (like noc-data.json) with entries rendered client-side.

tickets.title: GoatCounter analytics
tickets.description: Placeholder script already in index.html and tankpit.html. Needs: sign up at goatcounter.com → get site code → uncomment script and replace YOURCODE.
tickets.notes: Commented script already in both pages.

tickets.title: More project pages
tickets.description: Deep-dive pages for Mail Scraper, Home Lab, Bible RAG. Similar to projects/tankpit.html.

tickets.title: TankPit Bot project page
tickets.description: projects/tankpit.html — detailed writeup of bot architecture, TankPit bible, leaderboard system, award generation.
tickets.notes: Live at /projects/tankpit.html

tickets.title: Job email scraper script
tickets.description: Python script scans Gmail/Outlook for job application emails, extracts company/role/status, exports CSV. Logged in ops.html scraper section.
tickets.notes: Working. Manual runs.

tickets.title: Run inbox cleanup script
tickets.description: Execute the mail cleanup script to clear old/junk job emails and reset baseline.

tickets.title: Set up dedicated job email address
tickets.description: Create a separate email for job applications so scraper has a clean, isolated inbox.

tickets.title: Auto-parse job emails into tracker.html
tickets.description: Scraper reads job emails and auto-populates tracker.html localStorage via exported JSON import. Closes the loop between scraper and job tracker.

tickets.title: Schedule scraper via cron
tickets.description: Run mail scraper automatically on WSL startup or daily cron instead of manual runs.

tickets.title: SNMP setup on Raspberry Pi
tickets.description: Install and configure SNMP daemon on RPi. Poll for network stats via custom script or SolarWinds.

tickets.title: Grafana dashboard on RPi
tickets.description: Stand up Grafana + Prometheus or InfluxDB on RPi for home network monitoring dashboard.

tickets.title: Pi-hole DNS ad blocking
tickets.description: Install Pi-hole on RPi for network-wide ad/tracker blocking.

tickets.title: Home network topology map
tickets.description: Document home lab topology. Could auto-generate via SNMP discovery.

tickets.title: Bible chunk ingestion + embedding pipeline
tickets.description: Scripts that crawl TankPit profiles (crawl_profiles.py, crawler.py), then rebuild_bible.py chunks and embeds them via nomic-embed-text-v1.5. Output: bible_chunks.json.
tickets.notes: Location: /home/ukhan/tankpit-ai/. 13,250 chunks. Rebuild: ~20-30 min.

tickets.title: tankpit alias + start-tankpit.sh startup script
tickets.description: Shell alias 'tankpit' runs ~/start-tankpit.sh — starts nomic-embed (8081) + Mistral (8080) in background, waits 30s for load, then starts bot. Aliases: restart-bot, stop-servers, startbot.

tickets.title: WSL auto-startup script
tickets.description: Generalized WSL startup: auto-mount paths, activate venvs, start services, set up aliases. Currently done manually. Could tie into cron or .bashrc.
